calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Lweis Gillian, #12355.

Daniel Borstein, Esq., for the Plaintiff
Plaintiff Manuel Rodriguez sworn and examined on his own behalf.
No appearance by Defendant(s) Robert Keller and Avikash Lal (Request to enter default as to Defendant Avikash Lal was entered by the clerk on April 4, 2013).
Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited. The Rental agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 84 Ervine Street, Unit B. San Francisco CA, 94134.
Damages $0.00
Holdover damages $0.00
Pre-judgment interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Reasonable costs to be sumitted by Memorandum of Costs to filed within fifteen (15) days.
for a Total Judgment of $0.00
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge A. James Robertson; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Manuel Rodriguez is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Robert Keller is present.
Attorney Sebastian Kaplan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-22-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
